issues.description: Shared-definitions bar is weaker than item wording: required_pairs only demand universe_1093 + commercial_not_coverage on DOD.md. README lacks both anchors; manifests and report artifacts are not in CANONICAL_DOCS.
issues.recommendation: Follow-up: extend CANONICAL_DOCS and/or require universe_1093 on README+PRD; optionally scan selected manifests/report templates. Non-blocking under current executable-scanner bar (DOD as source of truth + cross-doc 95% target presence).

issues.description: conflicting_numbers only flags pct>=90 with _achieved verbs. Soft present-tense claims like 'cobertura operacional está em 97%' without those verbs are not conflicts.
issues.recommendation: Tighten _achieved or add present-tense operational-coverage patterns if false greens appear in prose.
